original_image_tags: A page of handwritten text on "Chimney Farm, Nobleboro, Maine" letterhead. The text is a witness description of an aerial observation.

elements.description: A handwritten letter on stationery with a printed letterhead reading 'Chimney Farm NOBLEBORO, MAINE' at the top left. The body consists of cursive handwritten text describing an observation of an object in the sky, mentioning 'double balloon', 'pear-shaped', and 'trailing object below'. Two dark punch holes are visible at the top edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content being a handwritten letter on 'Chimney Farm, Nobleboro, Maine' letterhead with a sky observation, and Description B adds details (punch holes, specific quoted phrases) without contradicting Description A.
